# AI API integration guide

> First-party integration notes maintained by the operator of AIFast. Model configuration, maintenance status and payment instructions can change.

## Main documents

- [Chinese guide](README.md): OpenAI-compatible setup, catalog verification and production checks.
- [English guide](README_EN.md): Setup for international developers.
- [Claude Sonnet 5 guide](sonnet-5-guide.md): Model-specific integration notes.
- [MCP guide](mcp-server-guide.md): MCP client and server configuration.
- [Tool integration guide](tools-integration-guide.md): Cursor, Dify and related clients.

## API endpoint

- Base URL: `https://www.aifast.club/v1`
- Authentication: `Authorization: Bearer YOUR_KEY`
- Model names: use an exact ID shown in the current console.

The `/v1/models` endpoint requires authentication. A public catalog entry does not guarantee current availability.

## Verified model examples

Checked against the public AIFast configuration on 2026-07-13:

- OpenAI: `gpt-5.6-sol`, `gpt-5.6-terra`, `gpt-5.6-luna`
- Anthropic: `claude-sonnet-5`, `claude-opus-4-8`, `claude-fable-5`
- xAI: `grok-4.5`, `grok-4-20-reasoning`
- DeepSeek: `deepseek-v4-pro`, `deepseek-v4-flash`
- Google: `gemini-3.5-flash`, `gemini-3.1-pro-preview`
- Alibaba: `qwen3.7-max`, `qwen3.7-plus`
- Zhipu: `glm-5.2`
- Moonshot: `kimi-k2.7-code`

These examples are not an uptime promise.

## International payment

- International users can pay only with cryptocurrency.
- 1 AIFast balance dollar ("1 刀") = 0.07 USDC or 0.07 USDT.
- Fiat payment is not available to international users.
- Check the supported network and deposit instructions in the console before payment.

The conversion describes an AIFast balance unit. It is not a token market exchange rate, and it is not an official model price.

## Reliability notes

This repository does not claim fixed latency, success rate, uptime, node count or automatic model substitution. Measure from your deployment region and implement bounded retries and explicit fallback in your own application.

## Links

- Website and console: https://www.aifast.club
- Catalog and maintenance reference: https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/KKWANG4444/ai-api-proxy-china-guide
